New
York
Artist.

I'm a New York–based artist exploring emotion through figurative work. My pieces focus on vulnerability, identity, and the tension between physical form and internal experience.

Working primarily in graphic design and paint, I create images that feel intimate and relatable — raw enough to unsettle, bold enough to stay with you.
